sqlMap.select: select * from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into WillsEstateServicesLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, WESKey CheckedValue LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp WESCommentDesc ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #WESKey:NUMERIC# #CheckedValue# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# #WESCommentDesc# )
sqlMap.select: select CheckedValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, WESCommentDesc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, WESKey from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#
sqlMap.update:
update WillsEstateServicesLW set
CheckedValue = #CheckedValue# CheckedValue = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null WESCommentDesc = #WESCommentDesc# WESCommentDesc = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#
delete from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#
sqlMap.select: select CheckedValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, WESCommentDesc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, WESKey from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, WESKey, CheckedValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, WESCommentDesc from WillsEstateServicesLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and WESKey = #WESKey#
